rationale: The two `forall|v|` ensures have disjoint per-run triggers; re-asserting each pins `post_i.get_node_ref(v) == pre.get_node_ref(v)`. Sequence extensionality (`=~=`) collapses the two views (both `pre_self_@.skip(1)`), and a pointwise `assert forall` lifts pre-equality to `post1.get_node_ref == post2.get_node_ref` on common elements. Tuple equalities follow because both `r_i.0 == pre_self_@[0]` and both `r_i.1 == pre_self_.get_node_ref(r_i.0)`.
